response.global_analysis:
1. Reference Lyrics Match: The reference JSON did not contain lyrics. Underwent full manual transcription and translation of '常夜リペイント' (Joya Repaint) performed by HoloX. 
2. Translation Approach: Captured the theme of 'evil secret society' and translated the catchy lines, ensuring Japanese rhetorical questions (like '安穏？' and '壊してほしい？') flow grammatically. 
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the spoken lines and singing sections meticulously, handling fast transitions in the rapid-fire rap and chant segments smoothly.

subtitles.english: Cleaving in twain! Cut them down!

subtitles.original: 終わりなき輪廻に迷いし子らよ！
subtitles.english: You children wandering in the endless cycle of rebirth!
I shall invite you with pitch-black wings.

subtitles.original: 我ら、エデンの星を統べる者、秘密結社...
subtitles.english: We are the rulers of the Star of Eden, the Secret Society...

subtitles.original: Whoa oh, Whoa oh oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Whoa oh, Whoa oh oh oh oh...

subtitles.original: 反乱？どうしようもないこの世界
subtitles.english: Rebellion? There's nothing to be done about this world.
The bell tolling the end is ringing.

subtitles.original: パパパパタバタ Every single night
陰キャも陽キャも Sing a song loud！
subtitles.english: In-kyas and You-kyas alike, Sing a song loud!

subtitles.original: 気持ち良いことだけがすべて 落ちていく 闇の底へ
subtitles.english: Only feeling good is everything, falling to the bottom of the darkness.

subtitles.original: 甘い甘いメロディ ほら どうぞ どうぞ 手の鳴る方へ
subtitles.english: A sweet, sweet melody, come on, this way, this way, towards the clapping hands.

subtitles.original: もう人間でいられない
ほら 闇に染まれば...
subtitles.english: Come on, if you dye yourself in darkness...

subtitles.original: 望めば呉れてやろう 全て
subtitles.english: If you wish, I will give you everything.

subtitles.original: 狂う 狂う 狂い倒せ 火を付けろ！
subtitles.english: Go crazy, crazy, lose your mind! Set it on fire!

subtitles.original: すべてを喰らい尽くせ
Whoa oh, Whoa oh oh oh oh...
subtitles.english: Whoa oh, Whoa oh oh oh oh...

subtitles.original: 悪のカリスマ 導くぞ ついてきな\n正義とか知らない 地ならしして誘い
subtitles.english: The charisma of evil, I will guide you, follow me\nI don't know about justice, leveling the ground and inviting you

subtitles.original: 真面目に不真面目 天才の通常運転\n望み求め 願い叶える 世界征服！
subtitles.english: Seriously unserious, the genius's normal operation\nSeeking desires, granting wishes, world conquest!

subtitles.original: パパパパタバタ Every single night
退屈な世界へ バイバイバイ
醒めることのない夢を見せる
subtitles.english: I will show you a dream you won't wake up from.

subtitles.original: ほら お眠りなさい
もっともっと遠くへ ほら どうぞ どうぞ 行きたいんでしょう...
subtitles.english: Further and further, come on, this way, this way, you want to go, don't you?

subtitles.original: ほら 悪に染まれば...
subtitles.english: Come on, if you dye yourself in evil...

subtitles.original: 望む物 与えよう 全て
subtitles.english: I will give you everything you want.

subtitles.original: 狂う 狂う 掻き回せ 狂い尽くせ
subtitles.english: Crazy, crazy, stir it up, go completely crazy!

subtitles.original: ついに4周年！ 狂気の宴の始まりだ！
subtitles.english: Finally, the 4th anniversary! The banquet of madness begins!

subtitles.original: 貴様ら、準備はいいか！ 刮目せよ！
subtitles.english: Are you bastards ready?! Open your eyes and watch!

subtitles.original: holoX！holoX！ 手を上げろ！手を上げろ！
subtitles.english: holoX! holoX! Put your hands up! Put your hands up!

subtitles.original: 世界を征服する holoX！世界を変えていく holoX！
subtitles.english: holoX conquers the world! holoX changes the world!

subtitles.original: holoX！holoX！ 世界を征服する holoX！\n世界を変えていく holoX！世界はこの手で holoX！
subtitles.english: holoX! holoX! holoX conquers the world!\nholoX changes the world! The world is in our hands, holoX!

subtitles.original: ほら どうぞ どうぞ 身を任せて
subtitles.english: Come, this way, this way, surrender yourself.

subtitles.original: ほら 闇に染まれば...
subtitles.english: Come on, if you dye yourself in darkness...

subtitles.original: 望めば呉れてやろう 全て
subtitles.english: If you wish, I will give you everything.

subtitles.original: 狂う 狂う 狂い倒せ 火を付けろ！
subtitles.english: Go crazy, crazy, lose your mind! Set it on fire!

subtitles.original: すべてを喰らい尽くせ
Whoa oh, Whoa oh oh oh oh......
subtitles.english: Whoa oh, Whoa oh oh oh oh......
